name: openclaw--skills--alicloud-database-rds-supabase
description: Manage Alibaba Cloud RDS Supabase (RDS AI Service 2025-05-07) via OpenAPI. Use for creating, starting/stopping/restarting instances, resetting passwords, querying endpoints/auth/storage, configuring auth/RAG/SSL/IP whitelist, and listing instance details or conversations. Use when this capability is needed.
